title: Alchemist material
description: A stylized version of the blocks also goes well with the EIDOLON mod.
body:
Inspired by the EIDOLON mod

### ABOUT
Alchemist material is a texture pack that replaces the textures of metallic blocks, as well as precious stones, with their alchemically reliable analogues.

### USAGE
Sure, but include the name and link to this project.

### NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED
